title: lithocardium album
intro_study: According to "Farmakologiia i toksikologiia", lithocardium album exhibits antiarrhythmic action and increases coronary circulation rate, which can help to stabilize heart rhythms and improve heart function.
preparations: Lithocardium album has many herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, that are utilized for various medicinal purposes. Lithocardium album tea is often used to help lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health, while lithocardium album tincture is commonly employed as a digestive aid to soothe stomach issues. In addition, lithocardium album infusions are sometimes used as a natural remedy for anxiety and insomnia, promoting relaxation and reducing stress levels. Furthermore, lithocardium album extracts are also used in topical applications to help reduce inflammation and alleviate pain in the skin.
side_effects: Lithocardium album can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Prolonged use or excessive consumption may also lead to cardiovascular problems, like palpitations, high blood pressure, and arrhythmias. In some cases, lithocardium album can cause allergic reactions, resulting in skin rashes, hives, and itching. It's essential to consult a healthcare professional before using lithocardium album to avoid these potential side effects.
